# Summary

Describe the change and why it improves DRR.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Example or reproducibility artifact
- [ ] Test improvement
- [ ] Internal refactor with no behavior change
- [ ] Behavior change or new method

## Scientific Scope

State whether any scientific claim, metric definition, validation status, or
interpretation changed.

## Verification

- [ ] `python -m pytest`
- [ ] `python -m compileall src examples scripts tests`
- [ ] `python -m ruff check .`
- [ ] `python -m black --check .`
- [ ] Documentation/examples reviewed

## Notes For Reviewers

Call out assumptions, limitations, or follow-up work.
